variants.name: 阿诺德·瑞默
variants.ability: 如果你'疯狂'地证明你是阿诺德·里默且死于处决，一名存活的善良玩家可能会变成阿诺德·里默。
variants.otherNightReminder: If the 'Mad' reminder token is next to Rimmer and Rimmer was executed today, you may select an alive good character token and place the 'Becomes Rimmer' token next to them. Wake that player and show them the 'You Are' reminder token and the Rimmer character token. Replace their character token with the Rimmer token.:reminder:
